---
title: "Example_Run"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Example_Run}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
devtools::load_all('/n/sci/SCI-004264-CAS13DBASE/gRNASelect/gRNASelect') #to load a package from a directory
library(gRNASelect)
```

# Loading tables and filtering based on ATGC content
```{r}
x <- RNAFoldOutput

# Plotting ATGC % before filtering
gRNAatgcPlot(x)

# Plotting RNA Fold Scores before filtering
gRNAScorePlot(x)

# Perform filtering
y <- gRNAatgcFilter(x)

# Plots after filtering
gRNAatgcPlot(y)
gRNAScorePlot(y)

# Checking how many gRNAs per gene
gRNAperGene(y)

# Checking transcript regions
gRNAutrperGene(y)
```

# Select gRNAs based on Scores
```{r}
newgRNAs <- gRNASelection(y)

# Ploting after selection
gRNAatgcPlot(newgRNAs)
gRNAScorePlot(newgRNAs)
gRNAutrperGene(newgRNAs)
```

# Filter mismatches
```{r}
z <- gRNAmismatchFilter(path = "/n/sci/SCI-004264-CAS13DBASE/gRNA_design/gd2417/output_Hassan/",
                           data = newgRNAs)

gRNA96well(z, outputpath = "/n/sci/SCI-004264-CAS13DBASE/gd2417/test/")
```
